channel.title: Electric Boats News
channel.description: Your #1 source for electric boats, marine batteries, and sustainable maritime transport.

item.title: Best Electric Boats 2026 - Complete Buyer's Guide
item.description: Discover the best electric boats of 2026. Complete guide with top models, prices, range, features and expert reviews.

item.title: How Much Do Electric Boats Cost in 2026?
item.description: Electric boat prices in 2026: from budget to luxury. Complete pricing guide with costs for outboards, day boats, and premium electric vessels.

item.title: Electric Boat Battery Lifespan - How Long Do They Last?
item.description: Electric boat battery lifespan: how many cycles, years, and what affects degradation. Maximize your marine battery life.

item.title: Best Electric Boat Brands 2026
item.description: Best electric boat brands 2026: Torqeedo, ePropulsion, X Shore, Ray, Silent-Yachts and more. Complete comparison of manufacturers.

item.title: Electric vs Gas Boat - Complete Comparison
item.description: Electric boat vs gas boat: detailed comparison of costs, performance, maintenance, and environmental impact.
